headline: Chief Sales Officer- QMS
summary: Have developed and led some of the highest performing national sales, revenue, strategic solutions and network teams in Australian Media over the last 10 years. A passionate champion for the evolving Media industry and Digital Out of Home sector and an experienced and recognized leader through change in Private and Public organizational structures.

experiences.title: Formerly Chief Sales Officer
experiences.description: Have developed and led some of the highest performing and awarded national sales, revenue, strategic solutions and network/product teams in Australian Media over the last 10 years. A passionate champion for the evolving Media industry and Digital Out of Home sector and an experienced and recognized leader through change in Private and Public organizational structures.

recommendations:
Jamie Wood

Tim is the finest executive I've ever worked with.A highly respected and visionary leader, Tim managed the demands of running one of the largest revenue functions in the country at an elite level over a sustained period of time.His ability to oversee complex corporate governance, balance revenue and cost initiatives, inspire and engage the national sales force, manage large stakeholder groups, and project confidence and conviction to the market was unrivaled.Tim has my unwavering endorsement as a highly talented executive.
